days.summary: OpenAI launched ChatGPT workspace agents, a Codex-powered enterprise feature for shared, long-running workflows across tools and teams, marking a deeper push into agentic productivity software. Google also unveiled its eighth-generation TPU lineup as two specialized chips—one for training and one for inference—while ByteDance Seed officially released Seed 2.0, adding another major frontier-model entrant from China. AWS rounded out the day with new Amazon Bedrock AgentCore capabilities, including persistent company-specific memory built with Amazon Neptune and Mem0.
